generations.code:
t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        can_win = True
        for j in range(n):
            if a[j] > a[i] and b[j] > b[i]:
                # j dominates i, can j be beaten by someone else?
                beaten = any(k != j and (a[k] > a[j] or b[k] > b[j]) for k in range(n))
                if not beaten:
                    can_win = False
                    break
        res.append('1' if can_win else '0')
    print(''.join(res))

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    max_a_idx = max(range(n), key=lambda i: a[i])
    max_b_idx = max(range(n), key=lambda i: b[i])
    
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        # X can win if b[i] > b[max_a_idx] or a[i] > a[max_b_idx]
        if b[i] > b[max_a_idx] or a[i] > a[max_b_idx]:
            res.append('1')
        else:
            res.append('0')
    print(''.join(res))

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    max_a_idx = a.index(max(a))
    max_b_idx = b.index(max(b))
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        if b[i] > b[max_a_idx] or a[i] > a[max_b_idx]:
            res.append('1')
        else:
            res.append('0')
    print(''.join(res))

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    max_a_idx = a.index(max(a))
    max_b_idx = b.index(max(b))
    
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        # Can beat max_a player on map 2, or can beat max_b player on map 1
        if b[i] > b[max_a_idx] or a[i] > a[max_b_idx]:
            res.append('1')
        else:
            res.append('0')
    print(''.join(res))

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    min_a_idx = a.index(min(a))
    min_b_idx = b.index(min(b))
    result = []
    for i in range(n):
        if i == min_a_idx and i == min_b_idx:
            result.append('0')
        else:
            result.append('1')
    print(''.join(result))

                    break
        res.append('1' if can_win else '0')

input = sys.stdin.readline

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    max_a_idx = max(range(n), key=lambda i: a[i])
    max_b_idx = max(range(n), key=lambda i: b[i])
    
    res = []
    for i in range(n):
        # X can win if b[i] > b[max_a_idx] or a[i] > a[max_b_idx]
        if b[i] > b[max_a_idx] or a[i] > a[max_b_idx]:
            res.append('1')
        else:
            res.append('0')
    print(''.join(res))
